name: Joker
description: Joker is one of the clones who has his own playing card. Unlike his other brothers, he can infiltrate others and control them, he often also plays jokes on other clones. Joker is a brilliant prankster, so he will always find an excuse to make fun of someone. No one knows about him, since he does not appear directly, but whoever holds his card will always feel his presence.
creator: Mulmangcho123
